---
id: scans-immich-for-photos-missing-geodata
title: "Scans Immich for photos missing geodata"
description: "Calls the configured Immich instance and returns photos that lack location data along with candidate points from Dawarich within the configured time tolerance."
sidebar_label: "Scans Immich for photos missing geodata"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Scans Immich for photos missing geodata"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/immich/enrich/scan"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Calls the configured Immich instance and returns photos that lack location data along with candidate points from Dawarich within the configured time tolerance.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
